original: Schora advances, quick and precise, squeezing the trigger on her gun as she does so. The weapon barks loudly, streaming bursts of red-hot lead with every step its owner takes.
context: <<POS:00211411>> combatOutput("Schora advances, quick and precise, squeezing the trigger on her gun as she does so. The weapon barks loudly, streaming bursts of red-hot lead with every step its owner takes.",null,this)

original: Several shots impact all around you!

original: You’re raked by impacts from the gun!

original: Schora pumps a shotgun slung under her machinegun’s barrel and squeezes a secondary trigger, sending a blast of metal pellets at you!
context: <<POS:00211873>> combatOutput("Schora pumps a shotgun slung under her machinegun’s barrel and squeezes a secondary trigger, sending a blast of metal pellets at you!",null,this)

original: The blast rips into your armor, tearing it apart! It’s Sundered!
context: <> combatAppend("\n\nThe blast rips into your armor, tearing it apart! It’s Sundered!")

original: With a wicked grin, Schora taps a button on the side of her gun. The muzzle glows red-hot for a split second before its owner fires, sending streaks of red-hot lead your way. Each shot leaves a trail of fiery orange behind it, melting the snow as it passes!
context: <<POS:00212371>> combatOutput("With a wicked grin, Schora taps a button on the side of her gun. original: You grab cover before the burst hits you; the only thing you feel is water from where the shots hit, melting the ice encrusting the helipad.
context: <<POS:00212672>> combatAppend(" You grab cover before the burst hits you; the only thing you feel is water from where the shots hit, melting the ice encrusting the helipad.")

original: The rounds splatter against you like some infernal jelly, smearing across your "+({var0}?{var1}:{var2}.skinFurScales())+" with a sizzling agony!

original: Schora pulls a small blue sphere off her belt, knocks it against on her horns, and throws it at your feet. You jump back, expecting an explosion -- instead, the grenade lets out a little spark and what feels like a wave of static electricity in the air.
